classObjective: Understand the structure of an axiomatic system and distinguish between axioms and conclusions.
warmUp: What is the difference between a postulate and a theorem?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: real-world axiomatic systems; logical conclusions from rules; axioms as starting points
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice drawing conclusions from given axioms in geometric contexts
independentPractice: Practice problems applying axiomatic reasoning and distinguishing axioms from conclusions
assessment: Exit ticket: given a set of axioms, draw a logical conclusion and explain your reasoning
capReflection: Why are axiomatic systems important in mathematics?
